TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cilakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 216 buwan, 519 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 152 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 367 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Bunun 8%, Tayan 2%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilakesay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cilakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cilakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cilakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cilakesay hya' ga Silangkong. tay 'llaw na Cilakesay hya' ga Posko. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cilakesay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cilakesay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕilaŋkoŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa pos~ɕko. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cilakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 216 buwan, 519 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 152 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 367 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Bunun 8%, Tayan 2%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilakesay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cilakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cilakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cilakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cilakesay hya' ga Silangkong. tay 'llaw na Cilakesay hya' ga Posko. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cilakesay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cilakesay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕilaŋkoŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa pos~ɕko. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
